prompt: A breathtaking high-fantasy anime illustration of Leafa soaring high above a vast floating city of ornate gothic towers and cathedral spires rising through a sea of glowing clouds at sunset. The scene is viewed from a dramatic aerial angle, with the character centered slightly right of frame, flying diagonally forward over the city while looking back over her shoulder. She has long golden blonde hair tied in a very high ponytail with a large pale bow, pointed elf ears, a slim curvy build, and translucent yellow-green fairy wings made of luminous crystalline light. She wears a green and white fantasy outfit with gold trim: a short green dress or tunic, white armored chest detailing, a brown corset-like waist belt, white detached sleeves or fitted arm coverings, white thigh-high stockings with lace tops and dark garter straps, and brown knee-high boots. Her skirt, ribbons, ponytail, and wings stream backward in the wind to emphasize speed and altitude. The background is an immense sunlit aerial kingdom with countless detailed towers, domes, bridges, and castle-like structures piercing the clouds, rendered with intricate architecture and atmospheric depth. Warm golden sunlight pours in from the upper left, creating lens flare, rim light, sparkling dust motes, and glowing highlights across the wings and city. Use highly detailed anime painting, cinematic composition, dynamic foreshortening, soft volumetric clouds, radiant fantasy lighting, vibrant green-and-gold palette, epic adventurous mood, and polished gpt-image-2 quality.
